channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Steam's Most-Wishlisted Games Forced Into Early Release As Subnautica 2 Pulls A Hollow Knight: Silksong - GAMINGbible
item.description:
1. Steam's Most-Wishlisted Games Forced Into Early Release As Subnautica 2 Pulls A Hollow Knight: Silksong  GAMINGbible

item.title: Here's What Kojima Emailed Gabe Newell And Elon Musk About - Kotaku
item.description:
1. Here's What Kojima Emailed Gabe Newell And Elon Musk About  Kotaku
  2. Metal Gear Solid creator and "real visionary in our field" Hideo Kojima "was talking about how much he wants to go into space," so Valve boss Gabe Newell set him up with a SpaceX tour  GamesRadar+
  3. Cabe Newell Emailed Elon Musk About Hideo Kojima SpaceX Visit, Court Records Reveal  finchannel
  4. Gabe Newell emailed Elon Musk with unusual request for Hideo Kojima  Jang
  5. Gabe Newell May 01: Court Records Reveal SpaceX Email to Musk  Meyka

item.title: Apple's 2026 MacBook Pro Hits New Record Low Prices on Amazon - MacRumors
item.description:
1. Apple's 2026 MacBook Pro Hits New Record Low Prices on Amazon  MacRumors
  2. The M5 MacBook Air is the best MacBook for most people, and it's just 99 cents away from its lowest price ever  Mashable
  3. Save $200 on 14inch M5 MacBook Pro 1TB 24GB RAM this weekend  AppleInsider
  4. Deals: M5 MacBook Air up to $219 off, iPad Air $300 off, 24GB M5 MacBook Pro, Apple Watch Series 11 $160 off, more  9to5Mac
  5. M5 Pro MacBook Pro just hit its lowest price yet: Save over $210  Macworld

item.title: Instagram to stop recommending aggregator accounts to users - Mashable
